common.name: Name
common.dual_star_making_desc_1: 制作电影、电视剧、纪录片等影视作品，涵盖选题、剧本创作、筹资、预算管理、拍摄、后期制作及宣传推广等全流程
common.dual_ip_incubation_desc_1: 业务涵盖音乐剧、舞蹈表演、戏剧演出等主要演艺类型，深度参与剧目策划、演员选角、编排排练、舞美设计及灯光音效设置等关键环节，构建完整的内容创制与制作能力。
common.dual_audience_to_builder_desc_1: 康养旅游与学习深度融合，采用体验式教育方式，为学生及旅游群体设计包含户外活动、文化研习、身心康养等内容的综合行程，实现旅有所学、学有所养、养有所获。
common.dual_rights_dividend_desc_1: 深度布局文化艺术、设计、传媒及数字内容四大领域，提供包括创意产品设计、文化艺术展览策划、创意活动运营以及知识产权商业化运营在内的全链条专业服务，致力于推动创意价值的多维转化。
common.dual_ai_star_gamefi_desc_1: 艺人经纪是敦华的创始业务。多年来，我们与众多一线明星艺人建立了深厚的友谊与长期战略合作，提供专业化的艺人经纪服务，涵盖艺人包装、推广宣传、商业演出安排、合约管理等全方位支持。
common.dual_cultural_commerce_desc_1: 敦华投资运营文旅康养小镇、饮用水品牌等实业项目，以行业发展先行者为定位，打造多元化文化产业布局。我们聚焦具有长期发展潜力的实体项目，追求可持续的投资回报。

hero.description: A Hong Kong premium drinking water brand created in tribute to the city's Dongjiang water memory.
hero.secondary: A long-term expression of source respect, purity, and quality you can feel in every bottle.

origin.title: More than a name
origin.body1: For Hong Kong, Dongjiang water supply is part of a real and lasting civic memory. For Dongjiangquan, Dongjiang is not only the name of a source, but a reminder of origin, trust, and connection.
origin.body2: We chose the name to honour that bond between Hong Kong and Dongjiang water supply, and to turn the idea of remembering the source into a premium drinking water brand that can be seen, chosen, and trusted over time.

quality.title: Premium means proven
quality.description: Metasilicic acid, heavy metal control, and microbiological safety define the purity and consistency of this water.

metrics.label: Metasilicic Acid
metrics.description: A clearer natural mineral profile and a more refined drinking experience.

metrics.label: Heavy Metals
metrics.description: Lead, mercury, cadmium, and other indicators remain far below the standard limit.

metrics.label: Microbiology
metrics.description: A stable record of purity, safety, and consistency over time.

certifications.title: Verified by standards. Trusted over time.
certifications.description: From Hong Kong-recognised marks to international quality systems, each standard strengthens brand trust.

items.title: Hong Kong Tested Mark
items.description: A clearer and more transparent basis for trust through Hong Kong-recognised quality standards.

items.title: ISO 22000 & HACCP
items.description: Consistent food safety management and production control from source to output.

items.title: Halal Certification
items.description: A stronger foundation for wider market access and broader consumption scenarios.

product.description: From premium hospitality to everyday retail, each format is made for a different rhythm of use.

market.title: From Hong Kong to a wider market
market.description: Dongjiangquan has entered local retail scenes in Hong Kong and continues to extend through years of export experience and multiple overseas markets.

proofs.title: Hong Kong First
proofs.description: A clear expression rooted in the local market.

cta.title: Bring premium drinking water into more valuable settings
cta.description: If you are looking for a drinking water brand with Hong Kong identity, premium positioning, and international cooperation potential, we invite you to connect with our team.

featuredNews.title: RedotPay Adds SUI and USDC-Sui for More Seamless Global Stablecoin Payments
featuredNews.excerpt: RedotPay expands its stablecoin payment network with support for SUI and USDC-Sui.
featuredNews.content:
Main takeaways

  • RedotPay is among the earliest crypto card providers to support native USDC on Sui, strengthening its stablecoin payment capability.
  • Users in more than 100 countries and regions can now use SUI and USDC-Sui for more direct spending scenarios through RedotPay.
  • Users can send SUI, USDC-Sui and other supported assets into their wallet, creating a smoother path between holding and spending digital assets.

Why this integration matters

At 9:00 PM ET on April 20, 2026, RedotPay announced the expansion of its stablecoin payment infrastructure with support for SUI and USDC-Sui to unlock more real-time payment scenarios.

The new support improves the connection between on-chain assets and payments, giving users a lower-friction experience across cross-border transfers, everyday purchases and global settlement.

What it means for users

Inside the RedotPay app, users can manage on-chain assets and complete payments more directly. With the integration, Sui ecosystem users gain a clearer route into consumption scenarios, while payment users gain easier access to stablecoin-based cross-border settlement.

The value of stablecoin payments is not only availability, but how smoothly they connect to real-world spending.

For more context, see the latest developments from the Sui ecosystem.

featuredNews.title: TDS and pH: Key Indicators for Understanding Mineral Composition in Drinking Water
featuredNews.excerpt: A quick guide to TDS, pH, taste and stability in drinking water.
featuredNews.content:
TDS and pH are two of the most common parameters used to understand water quality, but they describe different dimensions.

TDS

TDS stands for total dissolved solids and is often used to describe the overall concentration of minerals and other dissolved matter in water. A suitable TDS range has a direct impact on taste and experience.

pH

pH reflects the acidity or alkalinity of water. Different pH ranges can affect taste, equipment compatibility and storage stability.

  • TDS focuses more on mineral concentration.
  • pH focuses more on chemical characteristics.
  • Only by looking at both can you understand water more completely.

featuredNews.title: Preserving the Source: Our Mountain Restoration Project
featuredNews.excerpt: A closer look at watershed restoration, soil recovery, and long-term ecosystem repair.
featuredNews.content:
Our mountain restoration initiative focuses on source protection, soil renewal, and biodiversity recovery across vulnerable watersheds.

  • Water sampling and long-term monitoring
  • Native plant recovery
  • Erosion control and trail repair
Protecting the source means protecting every downstream community that depends on it.
